name: arkand-sheben-zavod
description: ERP-модуль холдинга Arkand — Щебёночный завод (карьер). ТЗ Часть 4.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @sheben/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.build:backend: npm run build -w @sheben/shared && npm run build -w backend
scripts.build:frontend: npm run build -w @sheben/shared && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w backend && npm run lint -w frontend
